pageContext.name: Ahsoka Tano ¼ oz Gold Coin
pageContext.description: Sideshow and New Zealand Mint are proud to present the latest in the Classic Coin Collection for the smash hit Lucasfilm series, The Mandalorian™! The new release features Ahsoka Tano™ on a stunning engraved gold coin.  Each delicately engraved coin features Ahsoka Tano™, the heroic Togruta™ warrior. As a legal tender coin, the obverse bears the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II. All the coins are placed in a high-quality inner coin case and Star Wars™ themed box. The Certificate of Authenticity sits within the coin case and shows the coin's unique number in the mintage. With a limited worldwide availability for all coins, don't wait to order yours!
